name: korean-business-day
description: Node module for korean business days
author: Sangmin Yoon <simon.yoon@kakaostyle.com>

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.build: rimraf lib && tsc -b src/tsconfig.build.cjs.json src/tsconfig.build.esm.json && echo '{"type":"commonjs"}' > lib/cjs/package.json
scripts.test: npm run test:type && npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:cov: npm run test:type && npm run lint && vitest run --coverage
scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run changeset publish
